title: lithocarpus suffruticosus
intro: Lithocarpus suffruticosus, also known as the dwarf incense cedar, is a shrub-like evergreen plant native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus suffruticosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. Lithocarpus suffruticosus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
